Fields.Name: Text ID
Fields.Description: Key specified  Item name, 1-line help ID. No key specified  Category name ID. No text specified  Not displayed in pad / key settings (operation list display only)

Fields.Name: Key
Fields.Description: User input key to be assigned. If not specified, it will be treated as a category display item.

Fields.Name: Allow Unassignment
Fields.Description: Is it possible to unassign (default possible)

Fields.Name: Allow Pad Config
Fields.Description: Is it possible to change the pad operation assignment (default possible)?

Fields.Name: Allow Mouse Config
Fields.Description: Is it possible to change the mouse operation assignment (default possible)?

Fields.Name: Group
Fields.Description: Group for determining duplicate assignments. Cannot be duplicated in the same group

Fields.Name: Mapping Text ID
Fields.Description: Item name to be displayed in the operation list. 0  Do not display in the list

Fields.Name: View Pad
Fields.Description: Whether to display with key config (pad) (default display)

Fields.Name: View Keyboard/Mouse
Fields.Description: Whether to display with key config (mouse / keyboard) (default display)
